review.notes: OCR confirms all key facts in the draft: Richmond 7 Dartmouth 3, Humboldt 4 Pembroke 2, attendance 8,033, round-robin standings with Humboldt 2-0 and Richmond 1-1, and Pembroke vs. Richmond scheduled for that evening. The page is a scores/results digest with adjacent-column noise from other sports (lacrosse, rugby, soccer, softball, water polo), but the Sockeyes-relevant Centennial Cup content is correctly identified and described. No headline or byline is present beyond the section label "Centennial Cup."
